# Mother Hospitals & IVF Center

> Best IVF & Fertility Hospital in Boduppal, Hyderabad. Founded by Dr. E. Prashanthi Reddy (MBBS, DGO, PG Diploma ART – Kiel University, Germany). 19+ years experience. ART Act 2021 certified.

## About

Mother Hospitals & IVF Center is a fertility and maternity hospital located in Boduppal, Hyderabad, Telangana, India. The hospital specialises in IVF (In Vitro Fertilisation), needleless IVF, natural cycle IVF, infertility treatment, obstetrics and gynaecology, and cosmetic gynaecology.

**Founder & Medical Director:** Dr. E. Prashanthi Reddy
**Qualifications:** MBBS (Mamatha Medical College, Khammam), DGO (Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad), PG Diploma in ART – Kiel University, Germany
**TGMC Registration:** 50624
**Experience:** 19+ years
**Google Rating:** 4.7★ (500+ reviews)

## Services

- IVF (Test Tube Baby Treatment)
- Needleless IVF – pain-free IVF without conventional injections
- Natural Cycle IVF – IVF without hormonal stimulation
- IUI (Intrauterine Insemination)
- ICSI (Intracytoplasmic Sperm Injection)
- Low AMH Treatment
- Recurrent IVF Failure Treatment
- ERA Test (Endometrial Receptivity Assay)
- Laser Assisted Hatching
- Egg Freezing / Embryo Freezing / Semen Freezing
- TESA / PESA (Surgical Sperm Retrieval)
- Maternity – Normal Delivery & C-Section
- High Risk Pregnancy Care
- PCOS / PCOD Treatment
- Laparoscopy & Hysteroscopy
- Cosmetic Gynaecology & Vaginal Tightening
- Mother 9 Card – Antenatal Package (₹9,999/-)

## Current Offer

All-inclusive IVF Package: ₹99,000/- (includes stimulation injections, OPU, ICSI, consultations, scans). Valid till 30 June 2026.

## Contact

- **Website:** https://motherhospitals.co.in
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday, 11:00 AM – 2:00 PM and 6:00 PM – 8:00 PM

## Areas Served

Boduppal, Uppal, Ghatkesar, Malkajgiri, Nacharam, Habsiguda, Tarnaka, ECIL, Kapra, Kushaiguda, Yapral, Dammaiguda, Keesara, Alwal, Secunderabad, Nagole, LB Nagar, Kothapet, Dilsukhnagar, Medipally, Peerzadiguda, and across Telangana.

## Certifications & Awards

- ART (Assisted Reproductive Technology) Regulation Act 2021 – Certified
- STV Suman TV Doctor Award
- Gufic Biosciences Certificate of Appreciation
- AICOG 2024 – 20 ICOG Credit Points
- UKSH Masters in IUI & IVF
- PG Diploma in ART & Reproductive Medicine – Kiel University, Germany
- Advanced Laparoscopy Training – Satwalekar Institute, Hyderabad

## Phase 2 Treatment Pages (added June 2026)

- [Donor Egg IVF Hyderabad](https://motherhospitals.co.in/donor-egg-ivf-hyderabad.html) — For low AMH, premature ovarian failure, repeated IVF failure. ART Act 2021 compliant anonymous donor program.
- [IVF with Donor Sperm Hyderabad](https://motherhospitals.co.in/ivf-with-donor-sperm-hyderabad.html) — For azoospermia, failed TESA/PESA, severe male factor. Anonymous ART-Act registered donor sperm.
- [What is IVF? — Explained Simply](https://motherhospitals.co.in/what-is-ivf-hyderabad.html) — Plain-language IVF explainer: meaning, steps, who needs it, IVF vs IUI, common terms.
- [First IVF Consultation Guide](https://motherhospitals.co.in/first-ivf-consultation-hyderabad.html) — What to expect, tests ordered, documents to bring, questions to ask, how to book.

## Free Fertility Calculators & Tools

- [Ovulation Calculator](https://motherhospitals.co.in/ovulation-calculator.html) — Find ovulation date and 6-day fertile window from last period date and cycle length.
- [Period Tracker](https://motherhospitals.co.in/period-tracker.html) — Track cycle history and predict next period and fertile days.
- [Fertility Window Planner](https://motherhospitals.co.in/fertility-window-planner.html) — 3-month visual conception calendar with color-coded fertile days.
- [Due Date Calculator](https://motherhospitals.co.in/due-date-calculator.html) — Calculate EDD from LMP or IVF transfer date.
- [AMH Interpreter](https://motherhospitals.co.in/amh-interpreter.html) — Interpret AMH test results by age and understand ovarian reserve.
- [IVF Success Estimator](https://motherhospitals.co.in/ivf-success-estimator.html) — Estimate IVF success probability by age, AMH, diagnosis.
- [BMI Fertility Calculator](https://motherhospitals.co.in/bmi-fertility-calculator.html) — Check how BMI affects fertility and IVF outcomes.
- [PCOS Assessment](https://motherhospitals.co.in/pcos-assessment.html) — Self-assessment quiz for PCOS symptoms and risk.
- [Semen Analysis Interpreter](https://motherhospitals.co.in/semen-analysis-interpreter.html) — Interpret WHO semen analysis parameters.
- [Pregnancy Week Tracker](https://motherhospitals.co.in/pregnancy-week-tracker.html) — Week-by-week fetal development and milestones.
- [IVF Timeline Planner](https://motherhospitals.co.in/ivf-timeline-planner.html) — Day-by-day IVF schedule for Antagonist, Long, FET, and Mini protocols.
- [Fertility Assessment Quiz](https://motherhospitals.co.in/fertility-assessment.html) — 10-question fertility health self-assessment.
- [Best Days to Conceive](https://motherhospitals.co.in/best-days-to-conceive.html) — Calculate optimal conception days for a target pregnancy date.
- [Conception Calculator](https://motherhospitals.co.in/conception-calculator.html) — Plan backwards from a target due date to find conception window.
- [Endometrial Thickness Calculator](https://motherhospitals.co.in/endometrial-thickness-calculator.html) — Interpret endometrial thickness for natural and IVF cycles.
